name: Soft Molasses Cookies/Julia
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar together until smooth.
2. Add molasses, eggs, and sour cream to the mixture. Stir in baking soda, salt, ginger, and nutmeg.
3. Mix in enough flour to form a soft dough.
4. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes.
5. Roll out the chilled dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut the rolled dough into cookie shapes using a cookie cutter.
7. Place the cookies on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes.
9. Allow the cookies to cool before serving.
Makes approximately 5 dozen cookies.
